status_history.note: Task created — Module Settings - Deals: pipeline stages (reuse), win-loss reasons, scoring, duplicate detection, required fields, tags, automation.
Spec session started. 5 agents selected (Frontend-Lead lead, Backend-Architect, Data-Engineer, Domain-Expert, Test-Engineer). Mode: subagent.

Spec + discussion written applying the module-settings playbook verbatim. 7 bento cards, 6 new Prisma models, composite dealSettings router that re-exports pipelineConfigRouter, 16 automation toggles classified per playbook §8 (10 cat-1 wired + 6 cat-2 AI follow-ups under IFC-312). Routes to move under (list)/ + peer-stub redirects.
Plan session started. Decomposing to TDD phases RED -> GREEN -> REFACTOR -> VALIDATION.

Plan written: 48 file operations (33 create + 12 modify + 3 delete), 17 RED/GREEN/REFACTOR/VALIDATION macro steps, 10 completion gates, category-1 wiring audit (V-13) and category-2 follow-up audit (V-14) enforced. Plan-Reviewer self-review against 33-category rubric: APPROVED.

Exec iteration 3/10 — Phase 1 context_ack + foundational slice complete: 6 Prisma models + 2 migrations landed; packages/db generated & built; deal-settings.ts validator + 38 tests GREEN; notifications.ts +3 types + test assertion bumped 43→46; deal-automation.ts (16-flag interface + 10 helpers) + 30 tests GREEN. Plan checkboxes ticked: R-1, R-3, R-7, G-1a..e, G-2a..d, G-3a..b, G-4a..c.

Exec iteration 4/10 — dealSettingsRouter landed with 7 sub-routers (pipeline re-export + winLossReasons + scoringRules + duplicateRules + requiredFields + tags + automation). Registered in apps/api/src/router.ts. Router tests: 32 GREEN covering cross-tenant P2025 negatives, P2002→CONFLICT mapping, superRefine dedup via Zod, admin-only tag RBAC, soft-delete branch, $transaction wrapping, pipeline re-export reachability. pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api typecheck passes clean. All 175 opportunity module tests green. Plan checkboxes ticked: R-2, G-5a/b/c.

Phase 1 §3.2 Page Documentation Co-Change gate (caught during self-audit): updated docs/design/PAGE_MAP_AND_FLOWS.md deal-settings rows to describe PG-184's 7-card bento + peer redirects (replacing stub descriptions). Updated docs/design/sitemap.md tree entries. Verified navigation-reachability-audit.md rows still read SB=YES/Reachable=YES (URL space unchanged by (list)/ move). Sitemap total page count stays at 255 — PG-184 adds 0 net-new routes. Added 3 docs to plan Files to Modify (items 13-15) and added Gate 11 (Page Doc Co-Change).

Enforcement retrofit (Layer 1 + Layer 3) shipped so the §3.2 bypass can't recur. Created tools/scripts/exec-preflight/check-page-doc-cochange.mjs + check-plan-reviewer-subagent.mjs — both deterministic gates, exit 1 = BLOCKER. Wired into .claude/skills/exec/SKILL.md and .agents/skills/exec/SKILL.md as 'MANDATORY Preflight Scripts' (runs before Phase 1). Plan-session SKILL.md (both copies) now mandates real Plan-Reviewer subagent with one of three markers. Ran the real Plan-Reviewer subagent on PG-184 plan — verdict APPROVED WITH CHANGES: 3 ERRORs + 3 WARNs caught that self-review missed (MODIFY count 12→15, missing wiring test from CREATE list, G-3a/R-7 contradiction because the 3 notification types already exist, nav-reachability as verification-only, test file count 9→13, dependency chain update). All 6 fixes applied to plan. Both preflights now pass exit 0 on PG-184. feedback_exec_phase1_preflight.md memory added; MEMORY.md index updated.

Exec closed out. Frontend bento delivered: page.tsx + DealSettingsContent + DealSettingsLoading + 7 cards (Pipeline, WinLoss, Scoring, DuplicateDetection, RequiredFields, Tags, Automation) under deals/(list)/deal-settings/. opportunity.router.ts wired for category-1 toggles (capitalize, normalize, auto-merge / duplicate notify, delete guard, stage/owner/high-value notifications). 3 old top-level stubs deleted and 3 (list)/ redirects landed. Settings sidebar + settings-search carry Deals entry. IFC-310 + IFC-312 artifact appends + follow_ups.md sidecar registered. PRD addendum + dep-chains update committed. All 4 validations green (typecheck, 29 web + 200 opportunity + 25 wiring smoke + 123 validators all passing, lint 0 errors, build 0 errors, all 4 deal routes present in Next.js manifest). Plan checkboxes 78/78. Attestation written with 16 gate results.

notes: Iteration 4 of 10 landed: dealSettingsRouter + router tests + api typecheck clean. Iteration 4.5 (enforcement): Layer 1+3 preflight scripts + real Plan-Reviewer subagent caught 3 ERRORs missed by self-review. Next iteration (5): G-6 opportunity.router.ts consumer wiring + G-7 web orchestrator shell.
